blocks.text: Reitan hunts Florida glory — Arsenal brace for London siege
Kristoffer Reitan sits T7 at -4 through two rounds at the Cognizant Classic — well placed for Norway's biggest PGA Tour result of the season as moving day begins.
🎮 16:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) opens ESL Pro League Season 23 Stage 1 online
🏅 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony, Milano-Cortina
